violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (raw chicken over bacon). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Sugarcane was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Wheel at bandsaw was observed with chipped paint. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
